title: Nether Bricks Fix
description: Fixes the shading on the nether bricks texture by shifting the entire texture one pixel upwards!
body:
When the tuff bricks were first released to the general public, a large issue with them was that they had incorrect shading on the topmost row of pixels, causing them misaligned themselves with other brick types.
However, when I was building with nether bricks recently, I came to the shocking realization that ***the nether bricks textures all had the same issue***

So I fixed it with my limited `paint.net` skills and posted the project here


***May you never be able to unsee it now! >=)***
